Identity: Paul Henry Dacalan — Software Engineer; aspiring Product Manager.
Education: BS Computer Science (Software Engineering), FEU Tech '27.
Location: Philippines (remote-friendly).
GitHub: https://github.com/polsalarm
Portfolio: https://pauldacalan.vercel.app/

Summary: Filipino software engineer who builds award-winning Web3 dApps on
Stellar (Soroban/Rust), AI-powered civic tech, and CI/CD tooling.

Featured: PalengkePay, VeracityLink, NegosyoNav, ScoutGrid, Ka Asenso, BackTrack.
Full details, hackathon record, stack, and verification boundaries are in the
canonical /llms-full.txt and /public/PROOF.md.
